title: OpenScrub
name: openscrub
description: Local video redaction: automatically detect and blur faces, full-body silhouettes, license plates, and on-screen PII (names, SSNs, addresses, custom regex) in videos and screen recordings — with a human review step before anything is trusted. Nothing leaves your machine. NVIDIA users: swap the image tag to 'cuda' and add the nvidia runtime for GPU acceleration.
note: Web UI on port 8384 (HTTPS with a self-signed certificate — accept the browser warning once). Mount a media folder to scan server-side files in place.
